name: BEN_DIAG_FF_ATCHMNT_G13_V
query: SELECT NAME "Object Name", 'Plan' "Object Type", 'BEN_LER_CHG_OIPL_ENRT_F' "Table Name", 'UNSSPND_ENRT_RL' "Column Name", FFL.FORMULA_NAME "Formula Name", FFL.FORMULA_ID "Formula Id", FFT.FORMULA_TYPE_NAME "Formula Type Name", FFT.FORMULA_TYPE_ID "Formula Type Id", LCOE.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE "Effective Start Date", LCOE.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE "Effective End Date" , FFL.ENTERPRISE_ID "Enterprise ID" FROM BEN_PL_F PLN,BEN_OIPL_F OIPL,BEN_LER_CHG_OIPL_ENRT_F LCOE,FF_FORMULAS_F FFL, FF_FORMULA_TYPES FFT WHERE PLN.PL_ID=OIPL.PL_ID AND OIPL.OIPL_ID=LCOE.OIPL_ID AND LCOE.UNSSPND_ENRT_RL=FFL.FORMULA_ID AND FFL.FORMULA_TYPE_ID=FFT.FORMULA_TYPE_ID UNION ALL SELECT NAME "Object Name", 'Plan' "Object Type", 'BEN_LER_CHG_OIPL_ENRT_F' "Table Name", 'UNSSPND_RT_RL' "Column Name", FFL.FORMULA_NAME "Formula Name", FFL.FORMULA_ID "Formula Id", FFT.FORMULA_TYPE_NAME "Formula Type Name", FFT.FORMULA_TYPE_ID "Formula Type Id", LCOE.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE "Effective Start Date", LCOE.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE "Effective End Date" , FFL.ENTERPRISE_ID "Enterprise ID" FROM BEN_PL_F PLN,BEN_OIPL_F OIPL,BEN_LER_CHG_OIPL_ENRT_F LCOE,FF_FORMULAS_F FFL, FF_FORMULA_TYPES FFT WHERE PLN.PL_ID=OIPL.PL_ID AND OIPL.OIPL_ID=LCOE.OIPL_ID AND LCOE.UNSSPND_RT_RL=FFL.FORMULA_ID AND FFL.FORMULA_TYPE_ID=FFT.FORMULA_TYPE_ID UNION ALL SELECT PLN.NAME "Object Name", 'Plan' "Object Type", 'BEN_LER_CHG_PL_NIP_ENRT_F' "Table Name", 'UNSSPND_ENRT_RL' "Column Name", FFL.FORMULA_NAME "Formula Name", FFL.FORMULA_ID "Formula Id", FFT.FORMULA_TYPE_NAME "Formula Type Name", FFT.FORMULA_TYPE_ID "Formula Type Id", LCPNE.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE "Effective Start Date", LCPNE.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE "Effective End Date" , FFL.ENTERPRISE_ID "Enterprise ID" FROM BEN_PL_F PLN,BEN_LER_CHG_PL_NIP_ENRT_F LCPNE,FF_FORMULAS_F FFL, FF_FORMULA_TYPES FFT WHERE PLN.PL_ID=LCPNE.PL_ID AND LCPNE.UNSSPND_ENRT_RL=FFL.FORMULA_ID AND FFL.FORMULA_TYPE_ID=FFT.FORMULA_TYPE_ID UNION ALL SELECT PLN.NAME "Object Name", 'Plan' "Object Type", 'BEN_LER_CHG_PL_NIP_ENRT_F' "Table Name", 'UNSSPND_RT_RL' "Column Name", FFL.FORMULA_NAME "Formula Name", FFL.FORMULA_ID "Formula Id", FFT.FORMULA_TYPE_NAME "Formula Type Name", FFT.FORMULA_TYPE_ID "Formula Type Id", LCPNE.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE "Effective Start Date", LCPNE.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE "Effective End Date" , FFL.ENTERPRISE_ID "Enterprise ID" FROM BEN_PL_F PLN,BEN_LER_CHG_PL_NIP_ENRT_F LCPNE,FF_FORMULAS_F FFL, FF_FORMULA_TYPES FFT WHERE PLN.PL_ID=LCPNE.PL_ID AND LCPNE.UNSSPND_RT_RL=FFL.FORMULA_ID AND FFL.FORMULA_TYPE_ID=FFT.FORMULA_TYPE_ID UNION ALL SELECT PLTY.NAME "Object Name", 'PlanType' "Object Type", 'BEN_LER_CHG_PTIP_ENRT_F' "Table Name", 'UNSSPND_ENRT_RL' "Column Name", FFL.FORMULA_NAME "Formula Name", FFL.FORMULA_ID "Formula Id", FFT.FORMULA_TYPE_NAME "Formula Type Name", FFT.FORMULA_TYPE_ID "Formula Type Id", LCPTE.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE "Effective Start Date", LCPTE.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE "Effective End Date" , FFL.ENTERPRISE_ID "Enterprise ID" FROM BEN_PL_TYP_F PLTY,BEN_PTIP_F PTIP,BEN_LER_CHG_PTIP_ENRT_F LCPTE,FF_FORMULAS_F FFL, FF_FORMULA_TYPES FFT WHERE PLTY.PL_TYP_ID=PTIP.PL_TYP_Id AND PTIP.PTIP_ID=LCPTE.PTIP_ID AND LCPTE.UNSSPND_ENRT_RL=FFL.FORMULA_ID AND FFL.FORMULA_TYPE_ID=FFT.FORMULA_TYPE_ID UNION ALL SELECT PLTY.NAME "Object Name", 'PlanType' "Object Type", 'BEN_LER_CHG_PTIP_ENRT_F' "Table Name", 'UNSSPND_RT_RL' "Column Name", FFL.FORMULA_NAME "Formula Name", FFL.FORMULA_ID "Formula Id", FFT.FORMULA_TYPE_NAME "Formula Type Name", FFT.FORMULA_TYPE_ID "Formula Type Id", LCPTE.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE "Effective Start Date", LCPTE.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE "Effective End Date" , FFL.ENTERPRISE_ID "Enterprise ID" FROM BEN_PL_TYP_F PLTY,BEN_PTIP_F PTIP,BEN_LER_CHG_PTIP_ENRT_F LCPTE,FF_FORMULAS_F FFL, FF_FORMULA_TYPES FFT WHERE PLTY.PL_TYP_ID=PTIP.PL_TYP_Id AND PTIP.PTIP_ID=LCPTE.PTIP_ID AND LCPTE.UNSSPND_RT_RL=FFL.FORMULA_ID AND FFL.FORMULA_TYPE_ID=FFT.FORMULA_TYPE_ID UNION ALL SELECT SUBSTR(PLN.NAME,1,40)||' :: '||SUBSTR(OPT.NAME,1,40) "Object Name", 'Plan :: Option' "Object Type", 'BEN_OIPL_F' "Table Name", 'UNSSPND_ENRT_RL' "Column Name", FFL.FORMULA_NAME "Formula Name", FFL.FORMULA_ID "Formula Id", FFT.FORMULA_TYPE_NAME "Formula Type Name", FFT.FORMULA_TYPE_ID "Formula Type Id", OIPL.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE "Effective Start Date", OIPL.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE "Effective End Date", FFL.ENTERPRISE_ID "Enterprise ID" FROM BEN_PL_F PLN , BEN_OPT_F OPT , BEN_OIPL_F OIPL , FF_FORMULAS_F FFL , FF_FORMULA_TYPES FFT WHERE PLN.PL_ID = OIPL.PL_ID AND OPT.OPT_ID = OIPL.OPT_ID AND OIPL.UNSSPND_ENRT_RL = FFL.FORMULA_ID AND FFL.FORMULA_TYPE_ID = FFT.FORMULA_TYPE_ID UNION ALL SELECT Date", FFL.ENTERPRISE_ID "Enterprise ID" FROM BEN_PL_F PLN , BEN_OPT_F OPT , BEN_OIPL_F OIPL , FF_FORMULAS_F FFL , FF_FORMULA_TYPES FFT WHERE PLN.PL_ID = OIPL.PL_ID AND OPT.OPT_ID = OIPL.OPT_ID AND OIPL.UNSSPND_RT_RL = FFL.FORMULA_ID AND FFL.FORMULA_TYPE_ID = FFT.FORMULA_TYPE_ID UNION ALL SELECT PLN.NAME "Object Name", 'Plan' "Object Type", 'BEN_PL_F' "Table Name", 'UNSSPND_ENRT_RL' "Column Name", FFL.FORMULA_NAME "Formula Name", FFL.FORMULA_ID "Formula Id", FFT.FORMULA_TYPE_NAME "Formula Type Name", FFT.FORMULA_TYPE_ID "Formula Type Id", PLN.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE "Effective Start Date", PLN.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE "Effective End Date" , FFL.ENTERPRISE_ID "Enterprise ID" FROM BEN_PL_F PLN , FF_FORMULAS_F FFL , FF_FORMULA_TYPES FFT WHERE PLN.UNSSPND_ENRT_RL=FFL.FORMULA_ID AND FFL.FORMULA_TYPE_ID=FFT.FORMULA_TYPE_ID UNION ALL SELECT PLN.NAME "Object Name", 'Plan' "Object Type", 'BEN_PL_F' "Table Name", 'UNSSPND_RT_RL' "Column Name", FFL.FORMULA_NAME "Formula Name", FFL.FORMULA_ID "Formula Id", FFT.FORMULA_TYPE_NAME "Formula Type Name", FFT.FORMULA_TYPE_ID "Formula Type Id", PLN.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE "Effective Start Date", PLN.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE "Effective End Date" , FFL.ENTERPRISE_ID "Enterprise ID" FROM BEN_PL_F PLN , FF_FORMULAS_F FFL , FF_FORMULA_TYPES FFT WHERE PLN.UNSSPND_RT_RL=FFL.FORMULA_ID AND FFL.FORMULA_TYPE_ID=FFT.FORMULA_TYPE_ID UNION ALL SELECT SUBSTR(PGM.NAME,1,40)||' :: '||SUBSTR(PLTY.NAME,1,40) "Object Name", 'Program :: PlanType' "Object Type", 'BEN_PTIP_F' "Table Name", 'UNSSPND_ENRT_RL' "Column Name", FFL.FORMULA_NAME "Formula BEN_PL_TYP_F PLTY , BEN_PTIP_F PTIP , FF_FORMULAS_F FFL , FF_FORMULA_TYPES FFT Where PGM.PGM_ID=PTIP.PGM_ID AND PLTY.PL_TYP_ID=PTIP.PL_TYP_ID AND PTIP.UNSSPND_RT_RL=FFL.FORMULA_ID AND
